hero.headline: Perfectly Tailored Just for You
hero.subtext: Look your best with custom-made outfits that fit like a glove.

website.about: At Taylor's Tailoring, we specialize in custom-made clothing that reflects your unique style. Whether it's for a special occasion or everyday wear, we ensure every piece is crafted with precision and care. Let us help you look your best!

products.name: Custom Suit
products.description: Step into style with our tailored suits. Perfect for weddings, corporate events, or any occasion where you want to impress.

products.name: Traditional Attire
products.description: Celebrate your heritage with our beautifully crafted traditional outfits. Made to fit and designed to stand out.

products.name: Casual Wear
products.description: Stay comfortable and stylish with our casual wear. Perfect for everyday outings or relaxed weekends.
